dialogue_texts: Well, looks like you didn't want my purification, eh?
Your whole thing was a lie. I'm moving on to the next one.
You still managed to complete my mandatory training.
Even though I've sensed no glohm, I've got to keep going.
This won't be much, but the air is getting thicker towards the nearby Amber Woods. You'd better move fast.
The Amber Woods, huh? That's on the way to Yumemura. I'm off!
